name: Glowing Effect
summary: A mouse-reactive border glow that rotates around element edges based on cursor position with smooth animation.
detailedDescription: Glowing Effect creates an interactive border highlight that follows mouse position around element edges. The component uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth pointer tracking, calculating angle from element center to cursor using Math.atan2. An inactive zone (default 70% of min dimension) disables glow when cursor is near center. Proximity detection (configurable) enables glow when cursor approaches element. The glow uses CSS custom properties: --start for rotation angle, --active for enabled state. Framer Motion's animate function smoothly interpolates angle changes over configurable duration (default 2s) with ease [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]. Blur prop controls glow softness, spread controls intensity. Variant 'white' uses white glow, 'default' uses blue (#3275F8). Border width defaults to 1px. Disabled prop prevents listener attachment. This creates premium interactive border effect ideal for cards, buttons, or any element where mouse-following glow enhances perceived quality and draws attention.
purpose: Track mouse position around element edges
Rotate glow highlight to cursor angle
behavior: Calculates angle from center to cursor
Disables glow in center inactive zone
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
